title: Yijing Hexagram 16: Yu (Enthusiasm)
description: Hexagram 16 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 16 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Enthusiasm. It furthers one to install helpers and to set armies marching. Thunder comes resounding out of the earth.
